title: High-Revenue Restoration Franchise - Large Central Florida Territory
description:
Established restoration franchise serving Central Florida with a highly predictable, program-driven model. The Company specializes in insurance-related repairs, including water, fire, storm, and mold damage, and benefits from long-standing relationships with national TPAs, insurance carriers, and referral partners that drive consistent inbound work.

The operation is fully turnkey, supported by an experienced team, defined systems, and a strong reputation reflected in high customer satisfaction ratings, as well as national franchise brand recognition. With minimal reliance on outbound marketing, the business has maintained steady growth while preserving significant upside for a new owner.

Key Highlights:

*Established reputation and referral network
*Highly systemized program-driven revenue model
*Experienced & highly trained leadership
*Franchise platform with turnkey systems in place
*Meaningful growth opportunities through expanded marketing, service offerings, and territory penetration

Ad#:2493907
